title: Player Nerfs│玩家削弱
description: Make the player's mechanics more scientific and more like other AI mobs.│讓玩家的機制更科學，更像其他 AI 生物。
body:
# Current Function│目前功能
- Block interaction range for players in Survival or Adventure mode is reduced to 2.5│生存以及冒險模式的玩家的方塊互動距離降低至2.5
- entity interaction range for players in Survival or Adventure mode is reduced to 1.5│生存以及冒險模式的玩家的實體互動距離降低至1.5
